source_jobs.title: Operations & Automation Manager, Atlanta Based
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on-demand production of custom products – from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

The Role

This role sits within GelatoConnect Logistics (GCL), the engine responsible for the final, critical mile of our end-to-end solution. Logistics is one of the highest cost centers for our customers, and GCL turns this challenge into a competitive advantage through carrier abstraction, AI routing, and packaging optimization.

This is a hands-on, day-to-day role with clear ownership over logistics operations in your region. You’ll be responsible for ensuring shipments move smoothly, costs are predictable and competitive, and operational issues are addressed quickly and effectively. At the same time, you’ll play an active role in shaping how the platform evolves by feeding real customer and operational insight into product development and roadmap decisions.

You’ll work across multiple dimensions: operating the logistics engine, engaging directly with customers and carriers, analyzing performance data, and helping improve workflows through automation. Some work is forward-looking and analytical; some work is immediate and execution-focused. All of it directly impacts the experience our customers have when they use GelatoConnect Logistics.

What You'll Be Doing

 - Own day-to-day regional logistics operations end to end, ensuring shipments run smoothly, costs are controlled, and issues are resolved quickly

 - Monitor, analyse, and act on performance data through hands-on dashboard analysis, proactively identifying and resolving shipment issues, carrier exceptions, and operational risks, while tracking delivery quality, service levels, and cost drivers

 - Manage complex carrier relationships and logistics costs, including invoice accuracy, surcharges, and discrepancies

 - Identify and prioritise opportunities to streamline and automate operational workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and scalability

 - Build, design, implement, and continuously improve automated workflows, applying modern automation and AI tools to reduce manual work and increase reliability

 - Serve as an operational point of contact for carriers, ensuring service expectations, data flows, and processes are well understood and executed

 - Engage directly with GelatoConnect Logistics customers to resolve issues and explain service changes, acting as an internal advocate to ensure operational decisions reflect customer experience and impact

 - Translate operational and customer insight into product development, partnering with Product and Engineering to improve tools, workflows, and integrations

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Finance, Sales, and Customer teams to align operations, pricing, and platform capabilities

 - Share operational insights across teams to support data-driven decisions on performance, cost, and service quality

 - Continuously improve the platform, identifying gaps in tooling or data and supporting the rollout of scalable operationa

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on-demand production of custom products – from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

About GelatoConnect

GelatoConnect is the SaaS arm of Gelato, built to transform how the modern print industry operates. We offer two core products: GelatoConnect https://www.gelato.com/connect, our enterprise platform that is designed to serve as the operating system, helping print producers move away from fragmented, legacy systems by automating their procurement, workflows, and logistics into a single, seamless interface; and our AI Estimator https://www.gelato.com/connect/ai-estimator, an AI-powered quoting tool that enables instant, accurate estimates and smarter pricing strategies. By replacing manual calculations with intelligent automation, we empower our customers to protect their margins and win more business. Together, these products represent a full commercial stack for print businesses, from day-to-day quoting efficiency to end-to-end digital transformation. 

What You Will Be Doing

As an Account Executive, you will own the full sales cycle across both GelatoConnect products, managing a commercial portfolio that spans both transactional and strategic sales, from fast-moving product adoption cycles to complex, business transformation engagements, often with the same customer base. The ability to shift between these motions, and to sequence them intelligently, is central to how this role creates value. This is a high-ownership role for sellers who are motivated by variety, learning, and commercial impact.

Sales Execution and Deal Ownership

 - Own the full sales cycle across both products, from prospecting and qualification through to close

 - Drive outbound prospecting into priority accounts while converting inbound demand efficiently

 - Apply a Challenger-led approach for AI Estimator deals, moving quickly from discovery to close in 10-20 day cycles

 - Lead deep, consultative discovery for GelatoConnect deals, engaging commercial, operational, and technical stakeholders across 3-6 month sales cycles

 - Apply MEDDIC qualification rigorously across the pipeline, ensuring clear understanding of Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identified Pain, and Champion on all active opportunities

 - Design and articulate tailored solutions that map to complex customer workflows and operational needs

 - Navigate multi-stakeholder buying processes, procurement, and approvals on enterprise deals

 - Identify cross-sell opportunities and build pathways from AI Estimator adoption into broader GelatoConnect engagement

 - Collaborate closely with Product, Solutions, and Leadership on strategic deals

 - Consistently meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales quotas

Pipeline Management and Forecasting

 - Manage a mixed pipeline of transactional and strategic deals simultaneously, with accurate forecasting across both

 - Maintain excellent CRM hygiene to ensure pipeline visibility and actionable sales insights

AI-First Sales Pract

source_jobs.title: Account Executive, German Speaking
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on-demand production of custom products – from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

About GelatoConnect

GelatoConnect is the SaaS arm of Gelato, built to transform how the modern print industry operates. We offer two core products: GelatoConnect https://www.gelato.com/connect, our enterprise platform designed to serve as the operating system, helping print producers move away from fragmented, legacy systems by automating their procurement, workflows, and logistics into a single, seamless interface; and our AI Estimator https://www.gelato.com/connect/ai-estimator, an AI-powered quoting tool that enables instant, accurate estimates and smarter pricing strategies. By replacing manual calculations with intelligent automation, we empower our customers to protect their margins and win more business. Together, these products represent a full commercial portfolio for print businesses, spanning transactional product adoption through to complex, business transformation engagements.

Germany's print industry represents a €14B market, largely underserved by modern software. With approximately 6,300 printing companies, it is a large but highly fragmented market, dominated by SMEs still operating on legacy systems with disconnected, manual workflows. With an estimated €1B+ software opportunity across Europe, DACH is one of the highest-priority regions for GelatoConnect's growth. The opportunity here is significant, becoming the operating system for a market that is ready for digital transformation but has been underserved by modern software. This is an exciting moment to join, as our first German-speaking AE, you will be at the forefront of GelatoConnect's push into the DACH market, starting with Germany, with Austria and Switzerland representing the natural growth horizon as the business scales.

What You Will Be Doing

As an Account Executive, you will own the full sales cycle across both GelatoConnect products, managing a commercial portfolio that spans both transactional and strategic sales, from fast-moving product adoption cycles to complex, business transformation engagements, often with the same customer base. The ability to shift between these motions, and to sequence them intelligently, is central to how this role creates value. This is a high-ownership role for sellers who are motivated by variety, learning, and commercial impact. You will be joining a growing European team, bringing German-language capability and DACH market focus for the first time.

Sales Execution and Deal Ownership

 - Play a key role in building GelatoConnect's presence across the DACH region, with Germany as the primary focus, engaging print producers across key hubs

 - Own the full sales cycle across both products, from prospecting and qualification through to close

 - Drive outbound prospecting into priority accounts while converting inbound demand efficiently

 - Apply a Challenger-led approach for AI Estimator deals, moving quickly from discovery to close in 10-20 d

source_jobs.title: Product Manager, GelatoConnect
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato has created the world's largest global network for on-demand production of custom products, from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don't own production facilities, we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It's smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we're driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we're reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

What You Will Be Doing

The world of software is being reshaped by AI - and so is print. At Gelato, we are building GelatoConnect https://www.gelato.com/connect, an AI-powered operating system that helps print service providers (PSPs) run smarter, faster, and more profitably. We are at the forefront of bringing vertical SaaS and AI into one of the world's oldest industries.

Product Managers at Gelato operate with full ownership of a product area, from early discovery through to live operation. You will be responsible not only for defining what to build, but for ensuring it works in practice - for customers, in real workflows, under real constraints.

You will work directly with PSP customers to understand their operations, identify pain points, and translate complex, often fragmented workflows into practical, usable software. You will partner closely with a small, high-ownership engineering team and play an active role in both discovery and delivery - including shaping solutions, validating outputs, and supporting execution. You will have accountability for business outcomes.

This is not a traditional PM role. There is no clear separation between product, design, and delivery. We expect you to build, not just specify. You will use AI tools - Claude, Cursor, Lovable, and others - to prototype ideas, validate concepts with working software, and accelerate every stage of product development. Our team follows an AI-first, prototype-first approach and we iterate at speed.

Key Responsibilities

 - Owning the vision, strategy, and roadmap for your product area - setting clear goals and driving outcomes, not feature output

 - Working directly with PSP customers to deeply understand their operations, pain points, and what "success" looks like in their business

 - Leading a team of engineers through rapid, iterative delivery cycles

 - Using AI tools daily to build prototypes, run data analysis, draft specs, create evals, and validate ideas before committing engineering time

 - Defining and tracking success metrics that tie to customer value and business impact

 - Collaborating across product teams and with Sales, Onboarding, and Customer Success to ensure cohesive product experiences

 - Obsessing over data quality, instrumentation, and feedback loops - you are the person who knows what is working, what is not, and why

 - Thinking entrepreneurially: identifying where to build, where to buy, and where to partner - and acting on it with urgency

Who You Are

You are a builder at heart. You believe the best product thinking happens when you can make ideas tangible - fast. You do not wait for permission or perfect information; you prototype, test, learn, and iterate. You treat AI as a thought partner and a force multiplier, not just a feature to ship.

You have an entrepreneurial mentality and thrive in environments where ambiguity is the norm. You are comfortable ope

source_jobs.title: Senior Accountant
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato http://www.gelato.com has created the world's largest global network for on-demand production of custom products, from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don't own production facilities, we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It's smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect http://www.gelato.com/connect, our SaaS platform, we're driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we're reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

What You Will Be Doing

We are seeking a high-performing Senior Accountant to join our finance team at Gelato. This role is the "engine room" of our financial operations, responsible for the end-to-end accounting lifecycle. You will operate with a high degree of ownership and autonomy, independently managing accounting responsibilities across a fast-paced international business. You will leverage AI and automation to streamline core processes, ensuring total accuracy in our financial data while maintaining robust regulatory compliance. The ideal candidate is a proactive professional with a background in accounting who thrives in a fast-paced, tech-driven environment.

Key Responsibilities

The Senior Accountant directs the end-to-end accounting lifecycle, leveraging AI and automation to streamline AP, AR, and payment workflows. This role ensures the integrity of the general ledger and maintains optimal liquidity through tech-driven cash management. You will oversee the full cycle of financial transactions, ensuring strict adherence to tax regulations and statutory requirements while using automated tools to enhance accuracy and audit readiness. By integrating advanced financial software, the Senior Accountant optimizes payment disbursements and collections, ensuring the firm’s core financial operations remain efficient, compliant, and at the forefront of regulatory excellence.

 - End-to-End Ledger Management: Oversee the full accounting cycle, ensuring precise execution of AP and AR processes, including automated payment disbursements and collections.

 - Treasury & Cash Management: Monitor daily cash positions, manage liquidity, and optimize payment timing to maintain healthy working capital across our global jurisdictions.

 - Tax & Regulatory Compliance: Ensure strict adherence to local and international regulations (VAT/GST/Sales Tax); manage tax filings, statutory reporting, support multi-entity compliance requirements, and serve as a key point of contact for external audits.

 - Automation & AI Integration: Identify and execute opportunities to automate manual accounting tasks using AI tools (e.g., Gemini, Python, n8n, or similar) to increase efficiency and data quality.

 - Process Excellence: Maintain and refine the internal control environment for payments and financial data, ensuring all transactions meet corporate and legal standards.

Who You Are

You are an experienced accountant with a hands-on mindset and a passion for building scalable financial processes. You bring structure to complex workflows and take pride in driving operational excellence through technology.

You are comfortable operating in a fast-changing, international environment where priorities may shift and where there may not always be a predefined playbook.

You are analytical, detail-oriented, and a strong collaborator who can al

source_jobs.title: AI Marketing Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GELATO

Gelato http://www.gelato.com has created the world's largest global network for on-demand production of custom products, from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We don't own production facilities; we build the software that connects them. With over 150 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It's smarter, faster, and greener.

Gelato operates across three distinct business lines: Optimalprint https://www.optimalprint.com/en, our B2C ecommerce brand serving millions of customers across 20+ markets; GelatoCreate http://www.gelato.com, which enables creators and small businesses to connect their own stores directly to our print network via API; and GelatoConnect http://www.gelato.com/connect, our SaaS suite built to modernize the print industry through smarter software for producers everywhere.

This role sits within Optimalprint. You'll be part of the wider Gelato organization, with access to its infrastructure, data, and talent, but your day-to-day focus is on growing one of the most ambitious ecommerce brands in the personalization space.




ABOUT OPTIMALPRINT

Optimalprint https://www.optimalprint.com/en is where Gelato began. What started as a single ecommerce platform has grown into a global brand operating in 20+ markets across Europe, North America, and Australia, helping millions of customers create personalized photo products, cards, prints, and more.

We run large, multi-million-euro advertising budgets across a wide portfolio of markets and channels. We move fast, measure everything, and we are rebuilding our customer acquisition engine for the age of AI. That is where you come in.




THE OPPORTUNITY

This is not a traditional performance marketing role. We are looking for an AI Marketing Specialist, someone who treats AI not as an occasional tool but as the default operating layer for everything they do, from media buying and analysis to creative production and competitor intelligence.

You will own real budgets and real channels from day one, with the mandate and the freedom to automate, experiment, and rethink how acquisition works at a global scale. If you are quantitatively minded, relentlessly curious, and excited by the idea that one sharp operator armed with AI can outperform an entire team using legacy workflows, this role is built for you.

You will learn the full mechanics of growing a large, global ecommerce company, work directly with engineering, creative, and data teams, and have a direct line to leadership. The ceiling here is high and largely set by your own ambition.




WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

Paid media across every major channel

 - Plan, launch, optimize, and scale campaigns across Meta Ads, Google Ads, YouTube Ads, TikTok Ads, Pinterest Ads, and emerging platforms (including AI-native ad placements as they mature).

 - Manage budget allocation and forecasting across 20+ markets, balancing growth and efficiency targets (ROAS / CAC / contribution margin).

 - Own bidding strategy, audience design, product feed quality, and full-funnel campaign structure.

AI-first automation and tooling

 - Build, test, and maintain AI agents and automation workflows that handle repetitive media-management tasks - negative keyword management, search-term mining, budget pacing, anomaly detection, and reporting.

 - Use LLMs and agentic tooling (e.g. Claude, MCP-based integrations, the platform ad APIs) to compress work that traditionally took days into minutes.

 - Continuously scout, evaluate, and roll out new AI tools across the marketing stack, with a bias toward shipping working prototypes over slide decks.

Creative pipeline

 - Drive the production of ad creatives and ad copy at scale using generative AI, building repeatable pipelines that turn product and market inputs into high-volume, on-brand static and video assets.

 - Run structured creative testing and feed winning insights back into the generation proc

source_jobs.title: Senior Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Gelato

Gelato has created the world's largest global network for on-demand production of custom products, from t-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.

At Gelato, we don't own production facilities, we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It's smarter, faster, and greener.

With GelatoConnect http://www.gelato.com/connect, our SaaS platform, we're driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we're reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.



What You Will Be Doing

With a global network of production, supply chain and distribution partners, operational excellence is at the core of how Gelato delivers value to its customers. As a Senior Operations Manager, you have a real chance to shape the operations network in your region from end to end: identifying the right production partners, bringing them onto GelatoConnect, and raising the bar on availability, speed, quality, and selection with every partner you add.

This is a role designed to stretch your leadership and analytical capabilities. You see the whole picture and you have the influence to improve it, working across the full partner lifecycle:

 1. Find the right partners: You identify production partners in your region who can help Gelato grow capacity, availability, speed, and selection, and you help shape where the network expands next.

 2. Bring them onto the platform: You help bring new partners onto GelatoConnect and into the Gelato network, working with our commercial teams so partners understand the value and get set up to fulfill for Gelato.

 3. Onboard and run regional operations: You get new partners live and operating to our standards, and you own ongoing performance across your partner base (availability, speed, quality, and selection expansion), diagnosing issues, driving improvements, and raising the bar with each partner you add.

 4. Shape the Procurement supplier ecosystem: You assess the supplier ecosystem and have a say in who should be on GelatoConnect Procurement, helping add the right suppliers so partners can tap into Gelato's buying power to reduce material costs and inventory overhead.

 5. Work with AI: You use the latest AI tools to scale your impact, automate manual work, and make faster, sharper decisions across everything you own. We expect you to build AI into how you operate, not as an experiment but as the way you get more done.

You will work closely with Product, Commercial, and supply chain teams to connect strategy to execution, using GelatoConnect http://www.gelato.com/connect as the backbone for how your region operates and scales. You will see the end-to-end picture, and you will have the influence to move it.



Who You Are

You have a start-up mentality and love digging in to find the root cause of a problem. You are a customer-obsessed problem solver who enjoys working directly with customers and partners. You are internally motivated, thrive in a fast paced environment, and are comfortable owning an outcome end to end. You can challenge the status quo, and you work closely with our Product and Tech teams, bringing what you learn from customers and partners back into the business so you have a direct path to shaping how the product and partner experience evolve.

 - You own outcomes end to end and get things done by influencing partners and cross-functional teams, witho

notes: Gelato is a global network for on-demand production of custom products, with a strong focus on sustainability and local production. The company has a mix of tech and non-tech roles, with a small number of tech roles in product management and AI marketing.
